query:
SELECT 'timeline_events' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM timeline_events
UNION ALL
SELECT 'actors', COUNT(*) FROM actors
UNION ALL
SELECT 'documents', COUNT(*) FROM documents
UNION ALL
SELECT 'stories', COUNT(*) FROM stories
UNION ALL
SELECT 'public_records_requests', COUNT(*) FROM public_records_requests
UNION ALL
SELECT 'documents_with_file', COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE file_key IS NOT NULL AND file_key != '';
